content.speakerText: Well, I should head out—got an early meeting tomorrow.
content.speakerTextCn: 我该走了，明天一大早有会。

options.text: Same here! Let's catch up next week?
Why are you leaving so early?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Same here! Let's catch up next week?' 既表达了共鸣，又用提问延续了社交关系，符合使用说明。选项1错误地假设明天见面，与对方'早会要走'矛盾；选项3显得指责，不礼貌；选项4虽然体贴，但未回应情感需求，偏离了'延续关系'的核心目标。

content.speakerText: This was such a fun night—thanks for inviting me!
content.speakerTextCn: 今晚太开心了，谢谢你邀请我！

options.text: Anytime! Let's plan the next one soon.
I didn't really want to invite you.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Anytime! Let's plan the next one soon.' 不仅礼貌回应感谢，还主动提出未来聚会，符合'加未来约定更自然'的使用说明。选项1虽礼貌但过于冷淡，未延续关系；选项3否定对方感受，不合语境；选项4完全不礼貌，破坏社交氛围。

content.speakerText: I'm going to call it a night—thanks for having me!
content.speakerTextCn: 我要回家了，谢谢你招待我！

options.text: Me too. Let’s do this again next month!
Don’t forget to pay me back for the wine.
I’m glad you came. You should leave now.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Me too. Let’s do this again next month!' 表达了共鸣并主动提议下次聚会，自然且符合社交礼仪。选项2虽礼貌但缺乏互动，显得单向；选项3庸俗破坏气氛；选项4语气生硬，像在驱赶客人。

content.template: I should head out—got an early meeting tomorrow. ________!
content.hint: 道别时常用的安全、温暖表达

content.template: Thanks for inviting me! ________! Let's plan the next one soon.
content.hint: 回应感谢时最自然的开头词，表示‘随时欢迎’

content.template: This was such a great night—I really ________ it!
content.hint: 表达‘享受’聚会的地道动词
content.knowledgePoint: 表达享受活动的动词搭配（enjoy + it）

content.speakerText: Well, I should head out—got an early meeting tomorrow.
content.speakerTextCn: 我该走了，明天一大早有会。
expectedAnswers: Same here! Let’s catch up next week?
I’m heading out too—let’s plan something soon!
Take care! We’ll get together before the month ends.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了理解并延续关系
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常道别习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'catch up', 'plan', 'get together' 等关键词

content.speakerText: This was such a fun night—thanks for inviting me!
content.speakerTextCn: 今晚太开心了，谢谢你邀请我！
expectedAnswers: Anytime! Let’s do this again next week.
No problem—you’re always welcome! I’ve already started planning the next party.
You’re so welcome! It was awesome having you here.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚回应感谢并主动提议未来互动
语言准确性：是否正确使用 'anytime', 'welcome', 'plan' 等结构
表达自然度：是否避免机械回应，有情感温度
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'anytime', 'welcome', 'plan', 'next one' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I’m gonna head home—it’s getting late. Thanks for a wonderful evening!
content.speakerTextCn: 我要回家了，时间不早了。谢谢你带来这么美好的夜晚！
expectedAnswers: Of course! Let’s not wait too long for the next one.
Thanks for coming! I had a blast—call me when you’re free!
You’re so kind to say that! Let’s make it a regular thing.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应感谢并推动未来联系
语言准确性：语法、时态、介词使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否避免生硬或过度正式，符合朋友间轻松语调
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'next one', 'call me', 'regular thing', 'had a blast' 等地道表达
